description: Wall Street ETF (wETF) was launched by Wall Street investors in 2023 on Ethereum as a utility token, giving users an earning-focused way to access diversified market themes. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 wETF gives all holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, turning it into a faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Wall Street ETF
